.editorconfig.general_idea: Refactor .editorconfig to use a glob pattern for web-related file types instead of relying on the global section for indentation.
.editorconfig.before:
indent_style = space
indent_size = 4

# We recommend you to keep these unchanged
end_of_line = lf
charset = utf-8
trim_trailing_whitespace = true
insert_final_newline = true

[*.md]
trim_trailing_whitespace = false

[{package,bower}.json]
indent_size = 2
.editorconfig.after:
# We recommend you to keep these unchanged
end_of_line = lf
charset = utf-8
trim_trailing_whitespace = true
insert_final_newline = true

# Change these settings to your own preference
indent_style = space
indent_size = 4

[*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}]
indent_size = 2

[*.md]
trim_trailing_whitespace = false

.gitignore.general_idea: Update .gitignore to match modern JHipster project structure and tooling defaults.
Simplify Node.js related ignore patterns by removing redundant subdirectory wildcards.
Update Eclipse-related ignore patterns to include factorypath and simplify settings.
Update IntelliJ IDEA ignore patterns to include output directories and simplify structure.
Add Visual Studio Code to gitignore.
Simplify Maven and Gradle ignore patterns by removing redundant wildcards.
Simplify directory ignore patterns for build, bin, and deploy.
Broaden log file ignore pattern to include extensions.
Add Maven Wrapper and ESLint cache to gitignore.

package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to version 14.15.0 or higher to align with JDK 11 era tooling standards.
package.json.why_exists: Older Node.js versions (e.g., 0.12) are incompatible with modern build tools and dependencies required for the new JHipster version, causing installation or runtime failures.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Grunt-based build scripts with Angular CLI and Webpack-based scripts.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is removed from dependencies; the old scripts would fail because the 'grunt' command is no longer available.

package.json.general_idea: Remove obsolete Grunt and legacy frontend dependencies.
package.json.why_exists: These packages are no longer used by the new Angular/Webpack stack and may cause conflicts or security warnings.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular framework dependencies for the new frontend stack.
package.json.why_exists: The application now uses Angular 11, requiring these core libraries to compile and run.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular CLI and build tooling dependencies.
package.json.why_exists: Required for the new build process (ng serve, ng build) to function.
The project migrates from Karma/Jasmine to Jest for unit testing.

package.json.general_idea: Add ESLint and Prettier dependencies for code quality.
package.json.why_exists: New linting and formatting standards are enforced in the updated project structure.
The project structure and generated code are tied to this specific generator version.
Reflects the specific application identity in the new version.

package.json.general_idea: Add configuration variables for backend port and packaging.
package.json.why_exists: Used by new npm scripts to dynamically configure build and run commands.
Integrates test results with SonarQube for code quality analysis.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target JDK 11 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target version is not updated to match the target JDK 11 environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation dependency with explicit javax.annotation-api to handle module system changes in JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11, causing NoClassDefFoundError or compile errors if not explicitly provided.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot version from 1.2.5.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to support JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.x does not support JDK 11; the application will fail to start or compile due to API incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace joda-time with java.time (JSR-310) dependencies as joda-time is deprecated and java.time is native in JDK 8+.
pom.xml.why_exists: While not strictly a compile error, joda-time is legacy; migrating to java.time aligns with JDK 11 best practices and removes external dependency on joda-time.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace commons-lang with commons-lang3 to use the modern Apache Commons Lang library.
pom.xml.why_exists: commons-lang is deprecated; commons-lang3 is the maintained version compatible with modern Java versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace mapstruct-jdk8 with mapstruct to use the standard MapStruct artifact compatible with JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: mapstruct-jdk8 is a legacy artifact; the standard mapstruct artifact is required for modern JDK compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add mapstruct-processor dependency to enable annotation processing for MapStruct in modern build environments.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without the processor, MapStruct interfaces will not be implemented, leading to compile errors or runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace springfox-swagger2 with springfox-oas to support OpenAPI 3.0 specification.
pom.xml.why_exists: Swagger 2.0 is deprecated; OpenAPI 3.0 is the current standard and required for modern API documentation tools.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-boot-actuator with spring-boot-starter-actuator to use the standard Spring Boot starter.
pom.xml.why_exists: Direct dependency on actuator is less robust than using the starter which manages transitive dependencies correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace mongeez with mongock for MongoDB schema migration management.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mongeez is less actively maintained; Mongock is the recommended modern alternative for Spring Boot applications.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace embedmongo-spring with de.flapdoodle.embed.mongo for embedded MongoDB testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: embedmongo-spring is outdated; de.flapdoodle.embed.mongo is the current standard for embedded MongoDB in tests.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jhipster-dependencies BOM to manage dependency versions centrally.
pom.xml.why_exists: Centralized dependency management ensures version compatibility across the JHipster stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jhipster-framework dependency to provide common JHipster utilities.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for JHipster-specific features and utilities to function correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-configuration-processor to generate metadata for configuration properties.
pom.xml.why_exists: Enables IDE support and validation for Spring Boot configuration properties.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add springfox-bean-validators to integrate Bean Validation with Swagger documentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Provides automatic documentation of validation constraints in the API spec.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add mongodb-springdata-v3-driver for Mongock to support Spring Data MongoDB 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for Mongock to interact with the updated Spring Data MongoDB version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin to explicitly set source and target to the new Java version variable.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incorrect bytecode if source/target levels are not updated to match the target JDK (11).

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-enforcer-plugin to require Java version compatible with JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Build will fail on JDK 11 if the enforcer rule still restricts Java to older versions (e.g., JDK 8 only).

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JIB Maven plugin base image to use an OpenJDK 11 runtime.
pom.xml.why_exists: Docker image build will fail or produce an incompatible image if the base image does not support JDK 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 vintage engine exclusion with explicit JUnit 5 dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Tests may fail to run or discover if the test framework is not updated to JUnit 5 standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace legacy Spring Cloud connectors with modern Spring Boot starters.
pom.xml.why_exists: Legacy Spring Cloud Connectors are deprecated and may not compile or run correctly with newer Spring Boot versions targeting JDK 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace legacy metrics reporter with Micrometer Prometheus registry.
pom.xml.why_exists: Legacy metrics libraries may not be compatible with newer Spring Boot actuator versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JWT dependencies for authentication support.
Add ArchUnit dependencies for architecture testing.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web dependency for standard error handling.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use annotation processors for MapStruct and Spring Boot configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Annotation processing may fail or not generate code correctly if not explicitly configured in the compiler plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-surefire-plugin to exclude integration tests and configure report directories.
pom.xml.why_exists: Integration tests might run during unit test phase causing failures or incorrect reporting if not excluded.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven-failsafe-plugin to run integration tests.
pom.xml.why_exists: Integration tests need a dedicated plugin to run in the correct lifecycle phase.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JaCoCo plugin to separate unit and integration test coverage reports.
pom.xml.why_exists: Coverage reports may be inaccurate or fail if not configured to handle separate test phases.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JIB Maven plugin for containerization.
Add properties-maven-plugin to read sonar-project.properties.
Add git-commit-id-plugin to generate git properties.
Update maven-resources-plugin to filter YAML configuration files.
pom.xml.why_exists: Configuration properties may not be resolved correctly if filtering is not applied to YAML files.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-war-plugin to handle static resources and web.xml absence.
pom.xml.why_exists: WAR packaging may fail or include incorrect resources if not configured for modern Spring Boot applications.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add frontend-maven-plugin for Node.js/NPM integration.
Update Spring Boot Maven plugin configuration for repackaging and main class.
pom.xml.why_exists: Application may not start correctly if the main class is not specified or repackaging is not configured.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add checkstyle plugin for code quality enforcement.
Add javadoc plugin for documentation generation.
Add SonarQube scanner plugin for code analysis.
Update profiles to include api-docs, tls, and webpack profiles.
Replace the deprecated yeoman-maven-plugin with frontend-maven-plugin to manage Node.js and Webpack builds.
pom.xml.after:
<plugin>
    <groupId>com.github.eirslett</groupId>
    <artifactId>frontend-maven-plugin</artifactId>
    <executions>
        <execution>
            <id>install node and npm</id>
            <goals>
                <goal>install-node-and-npm</goal>
            </goals>
            <configuration>
                <nodeVersion>${node.version}</nodeVersion>
                <npmVersion>${npm.version}</npmVersion>
            </configuration>
        </execution>
        <execution>
            <id>npm install</id>
            <goals>
                <goal>npm</goal>
            </goals>
        </execution>
        <execution>
            <id>webpack build dev</id>
            <goals>
                <goal>npm</goal>
            </goals>
            <phase>generate-resources</phase>
            <configuration>
                <arguments>run webpack:build</arguments>
                <environmentVariables>
                    <APP_VERSION>${project.version}</APP_VERSION>
                </environmentVariables>
                <npmInheritsProxyConfigFromMaven>false</npmInheritsProxyConfigFromMaven>
            </configuration>
        </execution>
    </executions>
</plugin>

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch the embedded servlet container from Tomcat to Undertow in the production profile.
Update maven-clean-plugin filesets to clean the new static resource directory structure.
Add spring-boot-maven-plugin build-info execution to generate Actuator build properties.
Add git-commit-id-plugin to the production build to include git information in the application.
Add a dedicated 'war' profile to enable the maven-war-plugin for WAR packaging.
Add an 'IDE' profile to include MapStruct processor for IDE compatibility.
Add an 'eclipse' profile to configure m2e lifecycle mapping and dependencies for Eclipse users.
Add an 'e2e' profile for end-to-end testing configuration.
Add a 'dev' profile with default activation, devtools, and Undertow dependency.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the custom ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner template.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update MongoDB configuration to use the new 'uri' property instead of separate host/port fields.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
data:
    mongodb:
        host: localhost
        port: 27017
        database: jhipster
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
data:
    mongodb:
      uri: mongodb://localhost:27017
      database: jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update message cache configuration to use ISO 8601 duration format.
Remove Thymeleaf XHTML mode configuration which is no longer supported or needed.
Replace legacy metrics configuration with JHipster specific properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false
        host: localhost
        port: 9999
    graphite:
        enabled: false
        host: localhost
        port: 2003
        prefix: jhipster
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
jhipster:
  # CORS is only enabled by default with the "dev" profile, so BrowserSync can access the API
  cors:
    allowed-origins: '*'
    allowed-methods: '*'
    allowed-headers: '*'
    exposed-headers: 'Authorization,Link,X-Total-Count'
    allow-credentials: true
    max-age: 1800
  security:
    authentication:
      jwt:
        # This token must be encoded using Base64 and be at least 256 bits long (you can type `openssl rand -base64 64` on your command line to generate a 512 bits one)
        base64-secret: bXktc2VjcmV0LWtleS13aGljaC1zaG91bGQtYmUtY2hhbmdlZC1pbi1wcm9kdWN0aW9uLWFuZC1iZS1iYXNlNjQtZW5jb2RlZAo=
        # Token is valid 24 hours
        token-validity-in-seconds: 86400
        token-validity-in-seconds-for-remember-me: 2592000
  mail: # specific JHipster mail property, for standard properties see MailProperties
    base-url: http://127.0.0.1:8080
  logging:
    use-json-format: false # By default, logs are not in Json format
    logstash: # Forward logs to logstash over a socket, used by LoggingConfiguration
      enabled: false
      host: localhost
      port: 5000
      queue-size: 512

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add Spring Boot DevTools configuration for development profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
devtools:
    restart:
      enabled: true
      additional-exclude: static/**
    livereload:
      enabled: false # we use Webpack dev server + BrowserSync for livereload

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add Jackson serialization configuration for pretty printing.
Add mail server configuration for development profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add logging level configuration for development profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: DEBUG
    tech.jhipster: DEBUG
    org.hibernate.SQL: DEBUG
    io.github.jhipster.sample: DEBUG

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add API docs profile inclusion for development profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
profiles:
    active: dev
    include:
      - api-docs
      # Uncomment to activate TLS for the dev profile
      #- tls

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update MongoDB configuration to use the standard Spring Data MongoDB 'uri' property instead of legacy host/port/database fields.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.before:
spring:
    data:
        mongodb:
            host: localhost
            port: 27017
            database: jhipster
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
spring:
  data:
    mongodb:
      uri: mongodb://localhost:27017
      database: jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replace legacy Dropwizard metrics configuration with Spring Boot Actuator management metrics configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false
        host: localhost
        port: 9999
    graphite:
        enabled: false
        host: localhost
        port: 2003
        prefix: jhipster
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate custom HTTP cache configuration to the new JHipster-specific properties namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
jhipster:
  http:
    cache: # Used by the CachingHttpHeadersFilter
      timeToLiveInDays: 1461

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add comprehensive JHipster-specific production configuration including JWT security, mail, and logging settings.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
jhipster:
  security:
    authentication:
      jwt:
        base64-secret: bXktc2VjcmV0LWtleS13aGljaC1zaG91bGQtYmUtY2hhbmdlZC1pbi1wcm9kdWN0aW9uLWFuZC1iZS1iYXNlNjQtZW5jb2RlZAo=
        token-validity-in-seconds: 86400
        token-validity-in-seconds-for-remember-me: 2592000
  mail:
    base-url: http://my-server-url-to-change
  logging:
    use-json-format: false
    logstash:
      enabled: false
      host: localhost
      port: 5000
      queue-size: 512

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add standard Spring Boot production server settings including graceful shutdown and compression.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
server:
  port: 8080
  shutdown: graceful
  compression:
    enabled: true
    mime-types: text/html,text/xml,text/plain,text/css, application/javascript, application/json
    min-response-size: 1024

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add explicit logging level configuration for production environment.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: INFO
    tech.jhipster: INFO
    io.github.jhipster.sample: INFO

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Disable Spring Boot DevTools for the production profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
spring:
  devtools:
    restart:
      enabled: false
    livereload:
      enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add standard Spring Mail configuration properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
spring:
  mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate from Spring Boot 1.x Actuator configuration to Spring Boot 2.x Actuator configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `management.security.enabled` and `security.basic.enabled` properties and changed the namespace for endpoint exposure from `endpoints.*` to `management.endpoints.*` and `management.endpoint.*`. Without this change, the application fails to start or actuator endpoints are not exposed correctly on the target JDK/Spring Boot version.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management.security.enabled: true
security.basic.enabled: false
endpoints.jolokia.enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      base-path: /management
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized
      roles: 'ROLE_ADMIN'

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate async task configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Spring Boot 2.x `spring.task` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x standardizes async configuration under `spring.task.execution` and `spring.task.scheduling`. The old custom `async:` block is no longer recognized by the auto-configuration, leading to default thread pool settings being used instead of the intended configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-mongodb-sample-application-task-
      pool:
        core-size: 2
        max-size: 50
        queue-capacity: 10000
    scheduling:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-mongodb-sample-application-scheduling-
      pool:
        size: 2

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate mail configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Spring Boot 2.x `spring.mail` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x expects mail configuration under `spring.mail.*`. The old custom `mail:` block is ignored by the `JavaMailSender` auto-configuration, causing mail services to fail or use incorrect defaults.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:
    protocol: smtp
    tls: false
    auth: false
    from: jhipster@localhost

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Swagger configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Springdoc/Swagger 2.x properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The old `swagger:` block uses properties specific to older JHipster/Swagger versions. Spring Boot 2.x migrations typically involve updating to Swagger 2.x or Springdoc, which require different property names (e.g., `terms-of-service-url` instead of `termsOfServiceUrl`). Without this, API documentation may not render correctly.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
swagger:
    title: jhipster API
    description: jhipster applications and beyond!
    version: 0.0.1
    termsOfServiceUrl: http://jhipster.github.io/
    contact:
    license: Apache 2.0
    licenseUrl: http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  api-docs:
    default-include-pattern: /api/.*
    title: jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication API
    description: jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication API documentation
    version: 0.0.1
    terms-of-service-url:
    contact-name:
    contact-url:
    contact-email:
    license: unlicensed
    license-url:

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add standard Spring Boot 2.x application metadata and JMX configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x applications typically require explicit `spring.application.name` and JMX settings for proper integration with management endpoints and cloud platforms. While not strictly a compile error, missing these can lead to runtime issues in managed environments.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  application:
    name: jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication
  jmx:
    enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add server session cookie security configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x encourages explicit security configurations for session cookies. This is a best-practice addition rather than a strict migration requirement for compilation.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
server:
  servlet:
    session:
      cookie:
        http-only: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add JHipster specific client application properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: These properties are used by the JHipster client-side code generation and runtime. They are part of the framework update but do not cause compilation failures if missing, just missing client-side context.

Update activation email body text to use the specific application name.

src/main/resources/i18n/messages_en.prop.after: email.activation.text1=Your jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication account has been created, please click on the URL below to activate it:

Add a new i18n key for account creation email text.
src/main/resources/i18n/messages_en.prop.after: email.creation.text1=Your jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication account has been created, please click on the URL below to access it:

src/main/resources/i18n/messages_en.prop.general_idea: Update reset password email title to use the specific application name.
Update reset password email body text to use the specific application name.
src/main/resources/i18n/messages_en.prop.before: email.reset.text1=For your jhipster account a password reset was requested, please click on the URL below to reset it:
src/main/resources/i18n/messages_en.prop.after: email.reset.text1=For your jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication account a password reset was requested, please click on the URL below to reset it:
